description_long: This object consists of two long, double-edged swords with straight, tapered blades and prominent crossguards. The blades are metallic and dark, with a subtle sheen, suggesting they are forged from steel or a similar alloy. Each sword features a handle wrapped in a textured material, one in a reddish-brown and the other in a tan color, providing both grip and visual contrast. The pommels are rounded and slightly ornate, with a subtle design at the end. The crossguards are curved and robust, offering hand protection and a classic medieval aesthetic. These swords are visually imposing and would be suitable for display, ceremonial use, or as props in an urban fantasy or historical context.
description: A pair of long, double-edged swords with dark metallic blades, textured wrapped handles in reddish-brown and tan, and ornate crossguards and pommels.
description_view_0: Two swords angled apart, showing the length of the blades and the contrasting handle wraps.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full length of the blades and the detailed crossguards.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the curvature of the crossguards and the pommel designs.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the handles' wrapping and the symmetry of the swords.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, wrapped in textured material, rounded pommel
